case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. PABLO OROPEZA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED FEB-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OROPEZA, PABLO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OROPEZA, PABLO $1,302.85 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,302.85, SEE SCANNED DOC (NO SASE, COPY IN OUTBOX OF 301)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT OROPEZA, PABLO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2009
ORDER VACATING DISMISSAL AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (NO SASE, COPY IN OUTBOX OF 301)

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 THE PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED IN WRITING THAT THIS COURT SHALL RETAIN JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT
DECLARATION OF MANDIE BULLOCK TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
